title: ClearMessage::Chat.text has no size cap
description: ClearMessage::Chat { text: String } has no deserialize_with bound. A hostile MLS peer sends a Chat message with a 100 MiB text field; the receiver allocates it without any application check, causing OOM before any handler runs. All other ClearMessage string fields were bounded in recent rounds; Chat.text was missed. Fix: add a dedicated deserialize_bounded_chat_text with a reasonable cap (e.g. 64 KiB), same pattern as deserialize_bounded_body.
